paper.title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models

visual_reference.grading_priority: The rendered PNG must visually resemble this crop. Data anchors alone are not sufficient for pass-level credit.
layout_anchors: compact paper-panel crop, not a modern standalone chart
thin plot frame and dense horizontal gridlines
centered explanatory annotation with two vertical guide lines
log x-axis with the 10^1, 10^2, and 10^3 tick structure visually aligned to the crop
curves sit above the bottom axis; the midrange minima are visually around 1% rather than touching 0%

curve_relationships.minimum_region: All three curves have shallow minima in the broad midrange and should not be drawn as touching the bottom axis.
curve_relationships.right_tail_notes: The 274M curve rises steeply to about 8% near 10^3; 50M rises to roughly 5.5%; 1.5B rises to roughly 3.8% by the right end.
